description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

On February 20 (Friday), we held a signing ceremony for an agreement with Sayuri Gakuen regarding the setup and operation of a welfare evacuation center during disasters.

In December of last year, Sayuri Gakuen offered to make facilities at the Accredited Childcare Center Sayuri Kindergarten available for use as a secondary evacuation shelter in connection with facility improvements.

During a disaster, infants and young children who would have difficulty sheltering at designated evacuation centers can move to the Accredited Childcare Center Sayuri Kindergarten as a secondary evacuation site. This allows us to provide evacuees with a safe and secure environment. After coordination, we finalized the agreement.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/shiseijoho/shichoshitsu/shichoblog/shisei2026/shisei202602/13181.html
summary: 📝 Mayor: Welfare evacuation center agreement signed with Sayuri Gakuen
